lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with age. The interior is clean and well-maintained. Mechanical systems are reliable and in good working order.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in like-new condition with no signs of wear. Mechanically, the engine, transmission, and all systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior paint retains a strong finish, with only a few minor stone chips on the front fascia and light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the upholstery is clean and free of tears, though there is slight wear on the driver's side bolster. Mechanically, the car runs smoothly with a complete service history, though it will likely need new tires within the next 5,000 miles. It's a solid, dependable choice for anyone looking for a quality pre-owned vehicle.

Looking for a reliable vehicle that gets the job done? This car is in fair condition and ready for its next owner! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its time on the road, it remains a solid and dependable choice for your daily commute. This is a fantastic opportunity to own a functional vehicle at a great price!
Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine currently runs roughly and likely needs a major overhaul, while the transmission exhibits noticeable slipping between gears. Externally, there is substantial rust on the rocker panels and wheel wells, and the paint is heavily oxidized with several large dents. The interior shows heavy wear, including significant tears in the upholstery and a non-functional climate control system. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited as a parts donor or a dedicated restoration project for an experienced mechanic.

This exceptional vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Meticulously maintained to preserve its sophisticated performance standards, it offers a commanding presence on the road. For the discerning driver seeking a reliable and distinguished automobile, this unit represents a premier acquisition within its class.

Hey everyone! 👋 I’m parting ways with my absolute favorite ride. It’s been super reliable and is still in really solid shape, making it the perfect dependable daily driver that still looks great on the road! It’s been well-loved, regularly maintained, and is totally ready to hit the highway with its next owner. You’re going to love how smooth it drives—come take a look and see for yourself!

One owner. Service records available. Good mechanical condition. Cold A/C. Ready to drive.

This vehicle has been exceptionally well-cared for and remains in impressive condition for its age. The exterior finish glows with a deep shine, showing only the slightest signs of road use, while the wheels are free of major curb rash. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin with supple upholstery and a dashboard that remains free of cracks or fading. Every feature, from the power sunroof to the heated seats, operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is robust; it starts promptly, shifts smoothly through all gears, and has a documented history of routine maintenance. Recent service includes a fresh oil change and a multi-point inspection, ensuring it’s ready for the road immediately. It represents a fantastic value for a buyer seeking a reliable, high-quality driver.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which offers a superior balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has been subjected to a comprehensive professional inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for safety and performance. With a history of consistent servicing and careful ownership, it represents an outstanding acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies dependable performance and refined engineering. This specimen has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and enduring value, it remains an exceptional choice for the discerning motorist who prioritizes both reliability and prestige.

Hey everyone! 👋 I’m parting ways with my reliable daily driver, and it’s been such a joy to own. It's in solid shape, super dependable, and ready to hit the road with a new owner today! If you're looking for a great ride that's been well-loved and runs beautifully, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This E92-generation M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8 engineering. The 4.0L power unit features independent throttle bodies and delivers a linear torque curve up to its 8,400 RPM redline. Power is managed through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and sent to the rear wheels via a functional M Variable Differential Lock. Recent preventative maintenance includes the critical rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service, ensuring long-term reciprocating assembly integrity. The chassis remains taut, equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) that provides distinct damping profiles. While exhibiting minor aerodynamic stone chips and light interior bolster wear consistent with a well-loved driver’s car, the subframe remains crack-free and the hydraulic steering rack provides excellent feedback. A visceral, analog performance machine ready for the tarmac.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Well maintained. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive overall condition, offering a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior finish retains a deep, glossy luster, with only the slightest signs of careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the leather seating shows minimal wear, and all interior electronics—including the high-fidelity audio system and navigation—are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is sound, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from a rigorous service history. Recently fitted with a fresh set of all-season tires and having passed a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this car delivers a quiet, confident ride. It is a turn-key example ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to a high standard of mechanical and aesthetic integrity. It offers a refined driving experience characterized by reliable performance and a well-appointed interior. This offering represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning buyer seeking a sophisticated vehicle that balances proven capability with enduring quality.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated balance of performance and reliability. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical integrity, it presents a refined aesthetic and a proven track record of dependable service. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber driving experience and enduring value.

Hey there! Are you looking for a super reliable ride that's ready for its next big adventure? This beauty is in great shape and has been so well-loved! It runs like a dream and looks fantastic on the road. It’s been my trusty companion, and I’m honestly a little sad to see it go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. Perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a premium driving experience, balancing reliable performance with sophisticated comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, showing only minor signs of use consistent with respectful ownership. Inside, the cabin is a clean, non-smoking environment where the leather upholstery remains supple and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, backed by a comprehensive service history and a recent preventative maintenance check. With responsive handling and a smooth-shifting transmission, this car is ready for the road with no immediate work required.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a refined driving experience and proven mechanical reliability. This unit represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term utility. Thoroughly inspected and prepared to our exacting standards, it stands ready for immediate delivery.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, maintained to a high standard. This vehicle offers a refined driving experience, characterized by mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Thoroughly inspected to ensure long-term reliability and performance consistency, it represents a superior acquisition for the discerning driver seeking value without compromise.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty car, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so it's ready to hit the road with its next owner right away. If you're looking for something reliable that looks great and drives even better, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS, delivering a visceral 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox, the drivetrain maintains exceptional mechanical feedback. The chassis is sorted with essential subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension featuring Bilstein dampers. A driver-spec example with a functional limited-slip differential, this vehicle is mechanically robust and optimized for performance.
Used vehicle in good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains its deep luster, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, such as a few faint stone chips on the front bumper. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free sanctuary; the premium leather seats remain firm and comfortable, showing only light character lines that speak to its history of comfortable commutes. Mechanically, this car is in its prime. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that delivers power effortlessly. All onboard electronics, from the crisp infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, function exactly as they should. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a turn-key vehicle, ready for its next owner to drive home with total confidence

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this unit offers a balanced synthesis of reliable performance and sophisticated comfort. It represents a premier acquisition for the discerning professional seeking a high-caliber driving experience and enduring value without compromise.
